definition_en: decompose; destroy (the composition of a substance)

definition_cn: 物体内部的窟窿,如铸件里的砂眼、肺结核病人肺部形成的窟窿等。
definition_en: cavity; hollow in an object, e.g. sand hole of a casting, pulmonary cavity in a TB patient, etc.

definition_cn: 发音时软腭上升，阻住鼻腔的通道，气流专从口腔出来的叫做口音，对鼻音和鼻化元音而言。普通话语音中m, n, ng三个是鼻音，ng尾韵儿化以后前面的元音变成鼻化元音，其余都是口音，如ɑ, e, o, b, p, f等。
definition_en: verbalsounds; sounds produced through the oral cavity when the soft palate rises and blocks the passage of the nasal cavity (as different from nasal sounds and nasal vowels). In putonghua, m, n, and ng are nasal sounds and a vowel preceding a combination of ng and r becomes a nasalized vowel, and the others, such as a, e, o, b, p, and f, are oral speech sounds.
be easy to do; be a piece of cake to sb.; come easy (to sb.)

definition_cn: 音韵学上指声母的代表字,如‘明’代表m 声母。
definition_en: (in phonology) character representing an initial consonant, as 明 míng for the initial m
